channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Grand Theft Auto VI reaffirms November 19 release, summer marketing rollout
item.content:encoded:
• PS5
  • Xbox Series

"So the next few weeks I don't think it'll be summertime yet," Take-Two Interactive Software CEO says.

Grand Theft Auto VI is still on track to launch for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series on November 19, Rockstar Games parent company Take-Two Interactive Software CEO Strauss Zelnick told Variety ahead of today’s Q4 2026 financial meeting.

Zelnick also said today’s earnings would not include a pricing announcement.

“We never make marketing announcements in our analyst calls,” Zelnick said. “Never ever ever.”

He continued, “I think reiterating November 19 as a launch day today is probably a positive. I think we’ve been really clear that we’re releasing the title on November 19.”

Asked about recent rumors, spurred by a Best Buy affiliate email that went out last week that suggested Grand Theft Auto VI pre-orders would open this week, Zelnick said that Rockstar Games will begin marketing the title this “summer,” as previously announced.

“So the next few weeks I don’t think it’ll be summertime yet, but when it’s summertime, Rockstar expects to start marketing [Grand Theft Auto VI].”

According to the astronomical calendar, summer spans June 21 to September 22.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/grand-theft-auto-vi-reaffirms-november-19-release-summer-marketing-rollout
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
